items.text: Add doc comment above the thread_lifecycle_contributor call in extension.rs

item.text:
I've successfully added the requested doc comment to the repo-intelligence crate. The comment was placed immediately above the `registry.thread_lifecycle_contributor(extension.clone())` line in the `install` function of `./ext/repo-intelligence/src/extension.rs`.

The change adds the following line:
```rust
// Registers this extension as ContextContributor / ThreadLifecycleContributor / TurnInputContributor.
```

This matches exactly what was requested in the task - a one-line doc comment that explains the extension's registration as all three contributor types, placed right before the thread lifecycle contributor registration call.
